perturbation.original_text: This Agreement shall govern all communications b etween the parties. Recipient understands that its obligations under Paragraph 2 ("Nondisclosure and Nonuse Obligations") shall surv ive the termination of any other relationship between the p arties. Upon termination of any relationship betwe en the parties, Recipient will promptly deliver to the Soc iety, without retaining any copies, all documents a nd other materials furnished to Recipient by the Society.
perturbation.changed_text: This Agreement shall govern all correspondence b etween the parties. Recipient understands that its obligations under Paragraph 2 ("Nondisclosure and Nonuse Obligations") shall surv ive the termination of any other relationship between the p arties. Upon termination of any relationship betwe en the parties, Recipient will promptly deliver to the Soc iety, without retaining any copies, all documents a nd other materials furnished to Recipient by the Society.
perturbation.explanation: Changing 'communications' to 'correspondence' narrows the scope of what the agreement governs. 'Communications' is broader, encompassing oral, electronic, and written exchanges, whereas 'correspondence' typically refers to written exchanges. This creates uncertainty about whether the agreement covers verbal disclosures. This contradicts the intention of governing all interactions regarding confidential information.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Recipient will maintain in confidence and will no t disclose, disseminate or use any Confidential Infor mation belonging to and/or related to Society, whet her or not in written form. Recipient agrees that Recipient s hall treat all Confidential Information of the Soci ety with at least the same degree of care as Recipient accords its own confidential information. Recipient furthe r represents that Recipient exercises at least reason able care to protect its own confidential informati on.
perturbation.justification: The changed text narrows 'communications' to 'correspondence'. The contradicted text states that 'Recipient will maintain in confidence and will not disclose, disseminate or use any Confidential Information belonging to and/or related to Society, whether or not in written form.' By narrowing the agreement to 'correspondence,' it creates a strong contradiction because the agreement may no longer govern verbal communications containing confidential information, making the original confidentiality obligation less enforceable. This aligns with the 'Misaligned Terminology - In Text Contradiction' definition because the scope of the agreement is narrowed, leading to a conflict with the confidentiality obligations outlined in the contradicted text, which apply to information 'whether or not in written form.'

perturbation.original_text: This Agreement shall be governed in all respects by the laws of the Commonwealth of Australia and by the laws of the St ate of Victoria; as such laws are applied to agreem ents entered into and to be performed entirely within Au stralia.
perturbation.changed_text: This Agreement shall be governed in all respects by the regulations of the Commonwealth of Australia and by the legislation of the St ate of Victoria; as such laws are applied to agreem ents entered into and to be performed entirely within Au stralia.
perturbation.explanation: Changing 'laws' to 'regulations' and 'legislation' creates a hierarchy issue. Regulations are typically subordinate to laws and legislation. This introduces ambiguity as to which level of legal authority takes precedence in interpreting the agreement and contradicts the agreement's intention to be governed by the full force of Australian law. It is not all laws but only regulations and legislations, weakening the argument in court.
perturbation.contradicted_text: A breach of any of the promises or agreements co ntained herein will result in irreparable and continuing damage to the Society fo r which there will be no adequate remedy at law, an d the Society shall be entitled to injunctive relief and/ or a decree for specific performance, and such othe r relief as may be proper (including monetary damages if approp riate).
perturbation.justification: The change from 'laws' to 'regulations' and 'legislation' introduces a hierarchical ambiguity in the legal framework governing the agreement. This weakens the 'Society's' ability to claim 'no adequate remedy at law' in the Contradicted Text because regulations and legislation are narrower and subject to interpretation, thus reducing the scope and certainty of legal recourse previously implied by 'laws'. This directly contradicts the Contradicted Text's assertion of an entitlement to 'injunctive relief and/ or a decree for specific performance' due to irreparable damage, as the diminished legal foundation makes such remedies less certain and more open to challenge, which is a strong contradiction. This aligns with the Misaligned Terminology definition, causing in-text contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: This Agreement constitutes the entire agreement with respect to the Confidential Information disclosed herein and super sedes all prior or contemporaneous oral or written agreements concerning such Confidential Information . This Agreement may only be changed by mutual agreement between the parties in writing.
perturbation.changed_text: This Understanding constitutes the entire agreement with respect to the Confidential Information disclosed herein and super sedes all prior or contemporaneous oral or written agreements concerning such Confidential Information . This Agreement may only be changed by mutual agreement between the parties in writing.
perturbation.explanation: Changing 'Agreement' to 'Understanding' weakens the legally binding nature of the document. An 'agreement' implies a firm commitment and legal enforceability, while an 'understanding' suggests a less formal arrangement. This undermines the enforceability of the confidentiality obligations. It contradicts itself in Section 6 itself, because it refers to the same document, but differently by saying Understanding vs Agreement, introducing uncertanty.
perturbation.contradicted_text: This Agreement constitutes the entire agreement with respect to the Confidential Information disclosed herein and super sedes all prior or contemporaneous oral or written agreements concerning such Confidential Information . This Agreement may only be changed by mutual agreement between the parties in writing.
perturbation.justification: The change from 'Agreement' to 'Understanding' introduces uncertainty about the legal binding nature of the document. The Changed Text uses "Understanding", while the Contradicted Text refers to the same document as an "Agreement". Because 'Agreement' and 'Understanding' have different legal implications, this misalignment of terminology creates a strong in-text contradiction, as the document now inconsistently refers to itself, making it unclear which term, and therefore which level of commitment, applies. This aligns with the definition of 'Misaligned Terminology - In Text Contradiction'.
